Title: Valid Registration
Desc: Register a new user with valid details
Steps: 1. Go to /register | 2. Enter Name, Email, Password | 3. Click Register
Expected: User created, token received, redirected to complete profile.

Title: Invalid Registration
Steps: 1. Go to /register | 2. Enter existing Email | 3. Click Register
Expected: Error 'User already exists' is displayed.

Title: Valid Login
Steps: 1. Go to /login | 2. Enter Email, Password | 3. Click Login
Expected: Redirected to Dashboard, token stored in local storage.

Title: Invalid Login
Steps: 1. Go to /login | 2. Enter valid Email, wrong Password | 3. Click Login
Expected: Error 'Invalid credentials' is displayed.

Title: SSO Login
Steps: 1. Click 'Continue with Google' | 2. Complete Google flow
Expected: Redirects to /sso-callback, syncs user, token received.

Title: SQL Inject. Login
Expected: Handled securely; generic denial response.

Title: Concurrent Session
Steps: 1. Login on Device A | 2. Login on Device B
Expected: Both sessions are valid, distinct JWTs function properly.

Title: Forgot Password
Steps: 1. Go to /forgot-password | 2. Enter valid Email | 3. Click Send
Expected: 6-digit OTP sent to email.

Title: Reset Password
Steps: 1. Enter OTP from email | 2. Enter new Password | 3. Submit
Expected: Password updated, success message shown.

Title: Invalid OTP Reset
Steps: 1. Enter invalid OTP | 2. Enter new Password | 3. Submit
Expected: Error 'Invalid OTP' or 'Expired OTP' shown.

Title: Rate Limit OTP
Expected: API restricts spamming or correctly processes without crashing.

Title: Update Info
Steps: 1. Go to Settings | 2. Update Name/Phone | 3. Save
Expected: DB updated, UI reflects new Name/Phone.

Title: XSS Profile Data
Expected: HTML entities escaped, script does not execute dynamically.

Title: Avatar Upload
Steps: 1. Go to Settings | 2. Select valid PNG/JPG | 3. Upload
Expected: Image saved, Navbar avatar updates instantly.

Title: Invalid Avatar
Steps: 1. Go to Settings | 2. Select PDF or large image | 3. Upload
Expected: Error message indicating invalid format/size.

Title: Delete Account
Expected: OTP sent to email for confirmation.

Title: Confirm Deletion
Expected: Account wiped from local DB and Clerk, logged out.

Title: View Services
Expected: All seeded services displayed with base prices.

Title: Category Filter
Expected: Only car-related services displayed.

Title: Search Service
Expected: Services matching 'Cleaning' shown.

Title: Service Details
Expected: Shows description, highlights, price, duration.

Title: Invalid Service
Expected: Shows generic missing fallback state or 404 block.

Title: Default Pricing
Steps: 1. Login as new user | 2. View services
Expected: Base prices shown (0% discount).

Title: Premium Discount
Steps: 1. Login as Premium user | 2. View services
Expected: Prices show 15% discount applied natively.

Title: Elite Discount
Steps: 1. Login as Elite user | 2. View services
Expected: Prices show 25% discount applied natively.

Title: Purchase Premium
Steps: 1. Go to Pricing | 2. Buy Premium | 3. Verify OTP
Expected: Plan status updated, 15% discount active.

Title: Purchase Trial
Expected: Expiry set to Now + 7 Days (Free Trial).

Title: Prorated Upgrade
Expected: Charged prorated difference, status is Elite.

Title: Downgrade Block
Steps: 1. Bypass UI buttons via API call
Expected: API logically bounces downgrade attempting mid-cycle.

Title: Cancel Plan
Expected: Plan cancelled, reason logged.

Title: Plan Expiry
Steps: 1. Set Date past expiry | 2. Fetch user data
Expected: Plan downgraded to Basic automatically.

Title: Add Service
Expected: Cart item count = 1.

Title: Remove Service
Expected: Item removed, total price recalculated.

Title: Cart Persistence
Desc: Reload page with items in cart
Expected: Cart items retain persistence securely in localStorage.

Title: Max Limits
Steps: 1. Try looping add to cart over 50 items.
Expected: Platform warns of quantity bounds safely and blocks adding.

Title: Guest Checkout
Expected: Redirected forcibly to /login.

Title: Form Validation
Expected: Validation errors required on Address/Time slots.

Title: Mock Payment
Expected: Payment initiates, TXN ID generated, marked Completed.

Title: After Checkout
Expected: Booking created in DB mapped to single paymentId.

Title: Email Confirm
Expected: NodeMailer fires confirmation HTML email.

Title: Email Outage
Expected: System falls back gracefully, booking still created locally.

Title: List Bookings
Expected: Chronological list of user's bookings displayed.

Title: Initial Status
Expected: Status should explicitly read 'pending'.

Title: Download Receipt
Expected: Valid PDF generated mapping transaction items correctly.

Title: Unauthorized Access
Steps: 1. Login as standard user | 2. Go to /admin
Expected: Diverted to home, 401/403 fallback.

Title: Login Admin
Steps: 1. Login as admin user | 2. Go to /admin
Expected: Unique dashboard loads, standard navs hidden.

Title: View All Users
Expected: Lists all MongoDB users and subscription statuses.

Title: Update Booking
Expected: Booking array in DB updates, user UI reflects.

Title: Edit Service
Expected: Database updates, frontend catalog reflects instantly.

Title: Support & Contact
Expected: ContactController registers message in DB properly.

Title: Private Routes
Expected: Native ProtectedRoute.js kicks user to login.

Title: Asset Vault
Expected: Assets fetch properly securely.

Title: Network Failure
Expected: Graceful Skeleton loaders and Toast Network errors shown.

Title: Invalid JWT
Expected: Token verification middleware fails, forces logout.

Title: Responsive View
Expected: Hamburger menu activates, grid wraps to 1 column format.

Title: Tablet Viewport
Expected: Dual columns activate safely, flex layouts behave.

Title: Dark Mode Switch
Expected: Backgrounds, inputs, and modals switch flawlessly.

Title: Skeleton Loading
Expected: Visual skeleton box shapes pulse perfectly while data waits.

Title: Infinite Loop Comp
Expected: Component spins seamlessly without jagged DOM jumping.

Title: Route Caching
Expected: Quick dom paints without continuous excessive re-fetching.
